description: Disciplined task execution: one task at a time, scope locked to the task, bounded verify-fix inner loop per task, no drift, no unbounded outer loop. Completion means every check passed with evidence. Includes parallel-planning: computed subagents-vs-inline verdict with dependency levels, agent count, and speedup estimate via /task-runner:plan.

interface.longDescription:
Disciplined task execution: one task at a time, scope locked, bounded verify-fix inner loop (max three cycles, then park with evidence), no unbounded outer loop, full-suite completion gate; status lives in the task index, not HTML dashboards. Includes /task-runner:run and /task-runner:plan (computed subagents-vs-inline verdict: dependency levels, agent count, speedup estimate).

Codex fidelity: 1 faithful, 3 degraded, 0 dropped surface(s).
interface.shortDescription: Disciplined task execution: one task at a time, scope locked to the task, bounded verify-fix inner loop per task, no drift, no unbounded outer loop. Completion means every check passed with evidence. Includes parallel-planning: computed subagents-vs-inline verdict with dependency levels, agent count, and speedup estimate via /task-runner:plan.

name: task-runner
